item.title: OC COMIC DUMP- please help me save my cat
item.description: https://gofund.me/07f27b50 I have been a long time imgurian comic artist who shares her stories and laughs for over ten years here on Imgur. I actually first became a comic artist here thanks to my fellow imgurians asking for more, and because of that love and support it started my official comic “ristay” identity. Imgur has helped me before and I’m desperately hoping they can help me again. Diesel is our 10 year old cat who has been loved and cared for his whole life, he’s also a big part of a lot of my comics. Within the last 8 days he has developed jaundice and has been seen by our emergency and local vet. Sadly they have no idea what is causing his sickness and are sending us to a specialist. His labs at least show he doesn’t have pancreatitis, but he does have some abnormalities that have left the vets baffled. X-rays showed no tumors or enlargement of organs either, but hopefully this specialist will be able to exam him closer. We were given three types of medicine and are trying to get into the specialist in time. so far we’ve had to pay $1,537 for his two vet visits. The specialist hasn’t given us a full breakdown of money yet but from what we have asked it can range from $800-$1500 for his first appointment with their further testing. We put a down payment already of $800. This appointment will hopefully give us a diagnosis and then we can go from there. Following appointments will also have their fees but we are praying to at least get the emergency visits and the medication covered. On top of all of this, our vet warned us Diesel might need to be hospitalized for multiple days while they do aggressive care. As we cannot afford this right now we have him home on medicine but if it doesn’t work he will need to be admitted. This is our biggest concern for when it comes to costs and why I decided to make the go fund me. I put the fund’s goal with all of this in mind but I don’t actually know what the final amount will be. I don’t expect to reach the full goal amount, just thank you to everyone who has already donated or shared. If I can have even a part of this covered it would help us so much. I’m hoping that we can ask for help. I know money is tight for everyone right now so thank you for even just reading this and sending well wishes. If you have ever laughed, smiled or enjoyed my comics I beg of you to help upvote this for the fund awareness. Please and thank you from the bottom of my heart. Go fund me: https://gofund.me/07f27b50 Second comic dump: https://imgur.com/gallery/uO7Gc2k
item.dc:creator: ristay

item.title: A multitude of fails
item.dc:creator: larskongo

item.title: My favorite Bible verse
item.description: 1 John 4:20 "Whoever claims to love God but hates a brother or sister is a liar. For how can you hate a brother and sister whom you have seen, and yet love God, whom you have not." Brother or sister is used pretty loosely in the new testament to mean 1. Literal brother or sister. 2. A person in the church "a brother or sister in Christ" 3. Another person in general. I choose to believe that 3 is the correct translation for this particular version. As such, I believe that people like Ben Garrett are apostates, people who have abandoned their faith and duty in exchange for fear, hate, and worldly sin. Edit: I just noticed a really interesting little tidbit. Ben refers to the snake with female pronouns, specifically saying "she hates God and his people." It's really interesting because in biblical cannon the snake and the demons use male pronouns. Looking at his Twitter this speaks to a deeper theme of distrust and dislike of women. Edit 2: I believe, with almost no evidence, that God appears to you when you die as the person you hate most in life. It is my fear that I will pass away and not see a foppish homosexual, a blue haired extremist, a Nazi, or Donald Trump, but my own eyes staring back at me. Edit 3: https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Matthew%2025%3A31-46&version=NIV This is my second favorite Bible verse, it's the parable of the sheep and the goats. To paraphrase: Jesus says that he will not allow people like Ben to rejoice with him in eternity, and will instead throw them into fire and personally rebuke them from heaven. You must be kind, you must be empathetic, and people who believe otherwise are doomed. Edit 4 So edit 2 came from a short story I wrote where a man dies and sits down with God in a sterile room. He is expecting to speak to a large man, someone strong and powerful, but instead he is greeted by a man in a dress, bubbly personality, and fits the most grating stereotype of a homosexual. He screams and rages against God, who lists all the times he assaulted gays, protested against them, fought to keep them in the shadows, and laughed at their suicides. God then simply asks "Is this the behavior of a Christian?" Before the man answers no, and is sent to the abyss. I don't hate gays or feminists, which wasn't clear in the edit. I do hate myself though, probably more than Nazis to be honest. I feel pity for Nazis and their hateful ilk. I see people who have been so consumed by their hate that it's turned them into twisted mockeries of humans. Hate overrides logic, to the point that they will spend hours measuring their skulls and building elaborate conspiracies to justify their hate, even when those conspiracies don't make sense. I really can't muster up that much hate for them because they're just... Pathetic to me. Yes I stand against what they do, I vote and talk about how I feel in hopes of helping people stay away from them, but Nazis.... I just feel empty when they come around. Edit 5: A few people have expressed the opinion that Jesus would hate this guy, or that they as Christians hate this guy. Regardless of religious tradition, the Jesus who said this would not hate him 42"But I say, do not resist an evil person! If someone slaps you on the right cheek, offer the other cheek also. ... 43 “You have heard the law that says, ‘Love your neighbor’ and hate your enemy. 44 But I say, love your enemies! Pray for those who persecute you! 45 In that way, you will be acting as true children of your Father in heaven." Do not hate him. do not treat him like an enemy. Understand that he is a lost soul, someone who has allowed hate to rule their life, but can still be redeemed. Nobody is ruined forever, everyone deserves redemption. Also, just to jump out in front of the comment "even someone like Hitler?" Jesus would say yes I would say no.
item.dc:creator: NotaScientologist

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Tuesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
not much more
gross
did a flying insect make this meme?
disturbing
imgur is awesome, it's pretty rare for someone to leave a negative comment
not everywhere in america
real mature guys
looks like a place where nothing bad has ever happened
mmm hmm
we've all been there
i guess
dinosaurs would be cool too
beg your pardon?
dang
this explains so many things about my life
i brought him back
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!

item.dc:creator: Kyzyl

item.title: I have happy tears. This is incredible. Many of you can now seek asylum in Canada
item.description:
Canada, fuck yeah! https://www.canada.ca/en/immigration-refugees-citizenship/services/refugees/about-refugee-system/2slgbtqi-plus.html
Update: One poster said that the US isnt specifically named. With that said, they do not mention all the countries that are included. I do not want to create false hope. Please look into it. I'm in your side. Update 2: more info https://www.rainbowrefugee.com/ Update 3: Ive been digging more into the requirements and IMO any person that meets the criteria can apply. That is my opinion based on what i have read. UPDATE 4: I made an email template with "ai" based on the requirements for asylum ( under my comment post below) I hope you send them in. Update 5: This has been enlightening. So much good discourse, minus a few obvious trolls and bots. There is no place i can find that says "no americans" on the website. ... My gut says, "Copy and send the email" No one loses. Even if Canada cant/wont help rn, they will get the message. Open discussion about what to do with American refugess in all free countries needs to start. Remember, it's been 8 weeks. There are 200 weeks left until January 20, 2029.
item.dc:creator: ProfessorDiscoSlacksandCorduroyTrousers

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1304 (yearn for the urn)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
It's bottling day for the Pando-monium mead!
Hey look, it's Data and Lore.
Yeah. Ugh.
This could be fun.
Let's do it.
There are worse dates.
Apparently, it's not enough to have real effects, though.
Bird Psychologist.
Squish.
This is true. As far as I'm concerned.
Gotta get in that dissociation time.
This describes both @sisipherr and Samwise Gamgee.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "it's okay. It's okay. I love you too." ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on.
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett
